project_summary: Requirements draft from 8 utterances (Client, PM) with 4 functional requirements, 1 non-functional requirements, 1 constraints, and 1 open questions.

functional_requirements.text: The university library needs a room reservation tool.
Students should see room availability and reserve by time block.
Librarians must be able to block rooms for maintenance.
We also must keep data on school servers only.

non_functional_requirements.text: The service should be reliable during exam week.

constraints.text: We also must keep data on school servers only.

assumptions.text: Maybe we can add QR check-in later.
Yes, but we have not decided the timeout.

open_questions.text: Should reservations auto-expire if students do not check in?

follow_up_questions: Should reservations auto-expire if students do not check in?
